title: South Shore Tool & Die ransomware incident

extortion.description: South Shore Tool and Die specializes in precision machining services across various industries, including food processing machinery, machine tools, and plastic and blow molding machine builders. They also cater to sectors such as printing press manufacturing, pump manufacturing, off-road construction, railroad, and robotics. Their diverse client base reflects their capability to meet the needs of multiple markets. The company is located in Benton Harbor, Michigan.
